## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation and SEO services to Magic's marketing team.](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end SEO and content creation services, leveraging AI workflows with human expertise for daily publishing and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Magic currently relies heavily on paid channels (80% of new revenue) but sees significant untapped potential in SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach includes a strategy sprint to create custom artifacts, followed by AI-driven content creation with built-in fact-checking and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [The service aims to replace traditional SEO agencies, offering scalable, high-quality content production with a focus on driving higher-intent organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Service Overview

  - [End-to-end solution: SEO strategy, content creation, publishing, graphic design, and LLM visibility analytics](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [AI workflows combined with human expertise for daily content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: Strategy sprint followed by execution](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Works with various CMS platforms, including WordPress and Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Aims to scale quality content production faster than traditional methods](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### Magic's Current Marketing Situation

  - [80% of new revenue comes from paid channels (Google Ads, Facebook)](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Recently engaged an SEO agency (3-6 months, month-to-month contract)](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Seeking to unlock significant SEO potential and scale up other channels](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiation

  - [Services at the scale of software: AI workflows with human touch](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Strategy sprint: Deep research on company, product, audience, and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Custom artifacts creation: Company context, writing guidelines, personas](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Daily publishing capability with built-in quality control](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Fact-checking agent for ensuring content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Ability to create both editorial and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Technology

  - [AI-driven workflow for brief generation, research, outlining, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Custom steps can be added to the workflow (e.g., chief medical officer review)](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Agentic article generation with quality benchmarks and iterative improvement](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Custom knowledge base ingestion for more informed content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Contextual editing interface for human refinement](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Pound.com: Built entire blog with guaranteed accuracy for tax-related content](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Augment Code: 10x organic traffic increase in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [RAM: Created interactive per diem calculator and city-specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler Pavlas to follow up with email for scheduling a deeper dive meeting](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Attempt to include GrowthX CEO Marcel in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Magic team to consider GrowthX as a potential replacement for their current SEO agency](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Further exploration of GrowthX's capabilities and how they compare to Magic's current SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/zoPeX9FCa7LGaRG182gMFYCUymoizGNo?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
